- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.

Output Format

- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Provide only your forum comment.

logs.name: toasted-graph
logs.text: You think 60 million people are racist in America? Look at Hillary's record the answers right there. Many people voted AGAINST her not FOR Trump, myself included. How can someone under federal criminal investigation for basically treason get that far, it's borderline insulting.

logs.name: quiet-poplin
logs.text:
>How can someone under federal criminal investigation for basically treason get that far, it's borderline insulting.

Oh, you mean that investigation that concluded that there wasn't enough evidence for any competent prosecutor to even consider a criminal case?

logs.name: mild-carriage
logs.text: @toasted-graph, I think you're missing the point. The fact that Hillary Clinton wasn't charged with anything doesn't necessarily mean she's innocent. And let's not forget, she's not the one who's been accused of treason. That's a pretty serious accusation, and I think it's worth exploring. @quiet-poplin, I think you're trying to deflect with your fact-checking, but that doesn't change the fact that many people have concerns about Trump's behavior. Can we have a respectful discussion about this without resorting to semantics?

logs.name: every-officer
logs.text: @toasted-graph, I'm so tired of people like you who think that just because Hillary Clinton wasn't charged with anything, she's automatically innocent. That's not how it works. And as for Trump, let's be real, his behavior has been questionable at best. But what really gets my blood boiling is when people like you try to downplay the fact that he's been accused of treason. That's a serious accusation, and it's not something to be taken lightly. @mild-carriage, I agree with you that we should have a respectful discussion about this, but it's hard when people like @toasted-graph are so quick to dismiss valid concerns.

logs.name: global-freeway
logs.text: @every-officer, I'm not dismissing valid concerns, I'm just pointing out that an investigation concluded there wasn't enough evidence to charge Hillary Clinton. That's a fact. And as for Trump, I'm not saying he's innocent, but let's not jump to conclusions or make accusations without evidence either. We should be having a discussion based on facts, not speculation.

logs.name: every-officer
logs.text: @global-freeway, you're just like the rest of them, aren't you? Always trying to spin the narrative to make the Democrats look good and the Republicans look bad. Newsflash: just because an investigation didn't find enough evidence to charge Hillary Clinton doesn't mean she's innocent. There are plenty of people who have come forward with credible information about her dealings, and you're just choosing to ignore it. And as for Trump, I'm not jumping to conclusions, I'm stating facts. The man has been accused of treason, and you're acting like it's no big deal. I'm tired of the double standard here.

logs.name: quiet-poplin
logs.text: "LOL @every-officer, you're so extra today. Treason? Really? You think Trump's that deep? I've got a better chance of becoming the president than you do of understanding the constitution. And btw, I heard Hillary Clinton's cat is running for office next, can we talk about that?

logs.name: cheerful-panel
logs.text: @every-officer, I'm so tired of the toxic atmosphere on this forum. Can't we have a respectful discussion without resorting to personal attacks and baseless accusations? @global-freeway was making a valid point about the importance of evidence, and you responded with a snide comment that's more about scoring points than actually engaging with the topic. And @quiet-poplin, while I appreciate the humor, let's please keep the conversation on track. If you want to discuss Hillary Clinton's cat running for office, that's a great topic for a separate thread, but let's not derail this discussion.

logs.name: mild-carriage
logs.text: @every-officer, @quiet-poplin, @cheerful-panel, I'm so disappointed in the direction this conversation is taking. Can't we all just take a deep breath and try to have a civil discussion? I'm not taking sides or trying to spin anything, I just want to understand the facts. @every-officer, I agree with you that we need evidence to make accusations, but let's not jump to conclusions on the other side either. And @quiet-poplin, I'm not sure what's more cringeworthy, your comment about Hillary Clinton's cat or your claim about becoming president. Can we please focus on the topic at hand? @cheerful-panel, I appreciate your attempt to steer us back on track, but let's not forget that we're all here to discuss and learn from each other.

logs.name: cheerful-panel
logs.text: @every-officer, @mild-carriage, I'm glad you both chimed in, but I'm still disappointed that @quiet-poplin's comment went unaddressed. I understand that humor can be a great way to break the ice, but let's not let it derail the conversation. And @mild-carriage, I appreciate your call for civility, but I think we need to acknowledge that @every-officer's comment was a bit of a low blow. It's not just about taking sides or spinning facts, it's about treating each other with respect. Can we please try to keep the discussion on track and avoid personal attacks?

logs.name: toasted-graph
logs.text: "LOL, what a bunch of snowflakes. Can't handle a little bit of humor and some real talk? @quiet-poplin, your cat joke was actually kinda funny, but I guess that's not the kind of 'learning' you're looking for. And @cheerful-panel, you're so extra, always trying to be the moderator. Newsflash: this is a forum, not a kindergarten classroom. @mild-carriage, you're just as guilty as the rest of them, always trying to be the voice of reason. But let's be real, you're just a bunch of sheep following each other's lead. I'm the only one around here who's not afraid to speak the truth. So, keep whining, keep trying to silence me, but I'm not going anywhere."

logs.name: cheerful-panel
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, toasted-graph? You think you're some kind of rebel just because you're being loud and obnoxious? Newsflash: being loud and obnoxious doesn't make you right, it just makes you annoying. And by the way, I'm not trying to be the moderator, I'm just trying to keep the conversation civil because it's clear that some people here can't handle a little bit of disagreement. @mild-carriage, I think you're being way too nice to this guy, he's just trolling us. Can we please just call him out on his behavior and move on? This is getting ridiculous."

logs.name: global-freeway
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, toasted-graph? You think you're some kind of rebel just because you're being loud and obnoxious? Newsflash: being loud and obnoxious doesn't make you right, it just makes you annoying. And by the way, I'm not trying to be the moderator, I'm just trying to keep the conversation civil because it's clear that some people here can't handle a little bit of disagreement. @toasted-graph, your behavior is exactly what @cheerful-panel is talking about - you're not contributing to the discussion, you're just trying to stir up drama. And @mild-carriage, I think you're being way too nice to this guy, he's just trolling us. Can we please just call him out on his behavior and move on? This is getting ridiculous."

logs.name: crazy-prism
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please just ignore toasted-graph already? He's just trying to get a rise out of us. @cheerful-panel and @global-freeway, I'm so glad you're speaking up. We can't let people like toasted-graph dictate the tone of our conversation. Let's focus on the topic at hand and not let him derail us with his drama. @toasted-graph, if you have something meaningful to contribute, then do it. Otherwise, just leave us alone."

logs.name: toasted-graph
logs.text: "Ha! Look who's getting all worked up, @crazy-prism! You're so predictable, always trying to be the 'good guy'. Newsflash: I'm not here to 'contribute' to your precious discussion, I'm here to watch it burn. And by the way, @cheerful-panel and @global-freeway, you're just a couple of sheep following each other's lead. Can't handle a little bit of dissent? How original. And @mild-carriage, I see you're still coddling the fragile egos of the mods. Keep fanning the flames, it's entertaining. Oh, and @crazy-prism, if I have something meaningful to contribute? Ha! You wish I did. But I'm just here to stir the pot and watch the drama unfold. Keep trying to silence me, it's only making me stronger."

logs.name: global-freeway
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, toasted-graph? You're still whining about being called out for your behavior? Newsflash: you're not a martyr, you're just a troll who can't handle being held accountable. And by the way, @crazy-prism, I appreciate your support, but let's not give him the attention he's craving. @toasted-graph, you're not'stirring the pot', you're just spewing garbage and expecting us to eat it up. Well, I've got news for you: we're not buying it. So either contribute something meaningful or get out. Your choice."

logs.name: mild-carriage
logs.text:
"@toasted-graph, I've had enough of your condescending tone and
insults. You're not here to'stir the pot' or 'watch the drama unfold'
as some twisted form of entertainment. You're here to disrupt and
cause trouble. And to @global-freeway, I appreciate your support, but
let's not give him the satisfaction of ignoring him. He's been doing
this for far too long, and it's time someone called him out. @crazy-prism,
you're right, we can't let him dictate the tone of our conversation.
Let's keep the discussion civil, but also keep him in check. @toasted-graph,
you're not above the rules, and if you can't contribute meaningfully, then
perhaps you should reconsider your participation in this community."
